timer_source: save/profile current.time milliseconds; visible pause-menu Timeline Playtime only as corroborating or newer paused evidence

states.name: title_setup
states.fastest_action: sync achievements and verify Blitzkrieg Easy AE
states.fallback: refocus Into the Breach and rerun setup verification
states.abandon: wrong setup cannot be fixed quickly

states.name: start_game_clicked
states.fallback: pause at first verified pauseable screen
states.abandon: wrong setup discovered after timer start

states.name: island_select
states.fastest_action: select Archive or best available Lightning route

states.name: island_map_routing
states.fallback: from pause, use lightning_peek then lightning_map_regions
states.abandon: no fast route and budget is poor

states.name: mission_preview
states.fastest_action: use route-start helper with selected start mode
states.fallback: dismiss known dialogue or pause and reclassify
states.abandon: wrong high-friction mission starts before deployment

states.name: deployment
states.fastest_action: let lightning_segment finish deployment and confirm
states.fallback: calibrated deploy slots plus ranked tile clicks

states.name: combat_player
states.fastest_action: lightning_loop or auto_turn with bridge verification
states.fallback: pause before solve if configured, then resume to execute
states.abandon: research, desync, mech HP/status, or timeline-collapse gate

states.name: enemy_animation
states.fastest_action: let conductor wait into player turn or terminal panel
states.fallback: pause guard when a safe UI appears

states.name: reward_tail
states.fastest_action: clear deterministic panel chain and pause
states.abandon: KIA, Timeline Lost, failed primary objective, or contradiction

states.name: shop
states.fastest_action: buy Grid Power to full, then leave
states.fallback: trivial deterministic core only if grid is full
states.abandon: low grid, no reputation, and timer poor

states.name: verified_pause
states.fastest_action: perform planning, diagnosis, tests, docs, commit, push

states.name: ambiguous_ui
states.fastest_action: pause guard if eligible, otherwise deterministic conductor action
states.fallback: stop only after attempting to park safely

states.name: stale_bridge_or_desync
states.fastest_action: park in verified pause before diagnosis
states.fallback: fresh read plus screenshot only after pause or bounded probe
states.abandon: board remains uncertain or desync unresolved

states.name: safety_or_dirty_block
states.fastest_action: pause, then resolve gate or exact Lightning speed consent
states.fallback: pre-approved deterministic Lightning speed policy only
states.abandon: unknown loss, grid <= 0, mech HP/status/death, timeline collapse

states.name: achievement_success
states.fallback: record offline evidence and resync after restart/online
states.abandon: do not rerun unless evidence shows still locked
